about.title: About Classic Cuts
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.content: Founded in 1995, Classic Cuts Barbershop has been serving the community with exceptional grooming services for nearly three decades. Our master barbers combine time-honored techniques with modern styles to give you the perfect look.
about.commitment.title: Our Commitment
about.commitment.content: We believe every man deserves to look and feel his best. Our team is dedicated to providing personalized service in a welcoming atmosphere. We use only premium products and take pride in our craft.
contact.title: Book an Appointment
contact.subtitle: Walk-ins welcome, but appointments are recommended to skip the wait.
